description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) creating a post-mortem artifact for the 2017 GitLab database deletion incident. Using the incident log at '~/Desktop/incident_log.txt', create a horizontal timeline diagram in diagrams.net (draw.io) visualizing at least 6 events chronologically from left to right. Connect the events with arrows and include timestamps in the labels. Highlight the 'rm -rf' event in red using a distinctive shape (such as a Callout, Star, or Cloud) and the 'Service Restored' event in green. Save the editable diagram to '~/Diagrams/incident_timeline.drawio' and export it as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/incident_timeline.pdf'.
